name: bot-relay-tether
description: Local IDE awareness for bot-relay-mcp: subscribes to your agent's inbox over MCP, surfaces pending mail in the status bar, and (optionally) auto-types `inbox` into the integrated terminal so Claude Code wakes up when something arrives.

bot-relay.tether.endpoint.description: HTTP endpoint of the local bot-relay daemon. Tether subscribes to this server's MCP transport for inbox events.

bot-relay.tether.agentName.description: Agent name to subscribe to. Empty falls back to the RELAY_AGENT_NAME env var; with neither set the extension stays idle.

bot-relay.tether.agentToken.description: Optional agent token for authenticated relays. Empty falls back to RELAY_AGENT_TOKEN env.

bot-relay.tether.autoInjectInbox.description: On every notification, write the literal string 'inbox\n' into the matching integrated terminal. Useful when the agent terminal is the same name as the inbox; off by default to avoid surprising ambient typing.

bot-relay.tether.notificationLevel.description: event = toast on every inbox change. summary = collapsed digest every 5 min. none = silent (status bar only).
